heading: Steele and Washington Bayous, and Lake Washington, Mississippi
label: 59g Steele and Washington Bayous, and Lake Washington, Mississippi
text: Steele Bayou, in Warren, Issaquena, Sharkey, and Washington Counties, Mississippi, Washington Bayou, in Issaquena and Washington Counties, Mississippi, and Lake Washington, in Washington County, Mississippi, are hereby declared to be nonnavigable within the meaning of the laws of the United States.
